rules.passing_requires: The verification command succeeds and evidence is recorded.

features.behavior: A fresh agent can understand RepoPilot scope, commands, current state, and next work from repository files alone
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: python scripts/check.py passed; Python compile check, 10 unittest smoke tests, and harness validation succeeded.

features.behavior: Create the production-oriented RepoPilot project architecture skeleton with CLI/API entrypoints, module boundaries, safety defaults, docs, and validation
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: python scripts/check.py passed; ruff, mypy, pytest, and harness validation succeeded.

features.behavior: Normalize a GitHub Issue URL or raw bug description into a structured repair request
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: python scripts/check.py passed; F01 fixture-backed issue intake tests are included in 19 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Align RepoPilot with the layered run manager, workflow, workspace, agent, tool, artifact, observability, and evaluation architecture
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: python scripts/check.py passed; ruff, mypy, 27 pytest tests, and harness validation succeeded.

features.behavior: Inspect a target repository and build searchable code context for planning
features.evidence: 2026-05-23: python scripts/check.py passed; F02 repository analysis and local retrieval tests are included in 29 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Produce a bounded dry-run repair workflow with plan, noop diff, test report, risk assessment, and PR description artifacts
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: python scripts/check.py passed; F03 dry-run repair workflow tests are included in 30 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Add approval-gated patch and test execution boundaries that can later run inside the sandbox
features.evidence: 2026-05-24: python scripts/check.py passed; F04 approval-gated patch/test boundary tests are included in 37 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Introduce sandbox execution planning with explicit dry-run versus approved execution modes
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; F05 sandbox execution planning tests are included in 55 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Replace NoopSandboxExecutor with real subprocess execution (timeout, output capture, error handling)
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; F06 subprocess sandbox executor tests are included in 65 passing pytest tests.

features.behavior: Replace NoopFileTool with real file read, write, and list operations
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; RealFileTool with read/write/list actions.

features.behavior: Replace NoopSearchTool with real keyword and grep-based code search
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; RealSearchTool with keyword and grep actions.

features.behavior: Replace NoopPatchTool with real unified diff application via patch command
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; RealPatchTool applies diffs with approval gate.

features.behavior: Replace NoopGitTool with real git operations (diff, status, log, add, commit)
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; RealGitTool with read-only and approval-gated write operations.

features.behavior: Real repair orchestrator driving INTAKE through REPORT with real tool execution
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; RealRepairWorkflowOrchestrator with full stage pipeline.

features.behavior: Test failure reflection and retry loop with bounded retries
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; Retry loop built into orchestrator TEST+REFLECT stages.

features.behavior: Persist repair artifacts (diff, test report, PR description) to disk
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; ArtifactsWriter.save_to_disk writes files to output directory.

features.behavior: CLI run subcommand for end-to-end repair workflow execution
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: python scripts/check.py passed; repopilot run command drives full pipeline with artifact output.

features.behavior: Code optimization: security hardening, correctness fixes, robustness improvements, data model hardening, architecture cleanup
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: Phase 1-5 optimization complete. Path containment, git arg sanitization, ReDoS protection, patch dry-run, CLI error handling, orchestrator stage validation, RunManager state machine, logging infrastructure, agent contracts cleanup. 65 tests passing.

features.behavior: Second-round optimization: security boundary completion, architecture dedup, test coverage, observability integration, data model hardening
features.evidence: 2026-05-27: Second optimization round complete. Security validations 16->24 (+50%), try/except 34->40 (+18%), tests 65->114 (+75%), shared StateMachine, unified RunStatus enum, pure-function _advance, TraceCollector wired into orchestrator, 4 new test files. 114 tests passing.
